description: Source-controlled packaging permission and entitlement intent for AppRelay client packages. This file is checked without running native package builders.

tauri.nativeCommandSurface: Tauri commands only; no Tauri filesystem, shell, clipboard, notification, updater, process, or HTTP plugin permissions are packaged.

defaultCapability.description: Default capability file declared so the packaging-check script can verify it matches a known-minimal shape. Only the main window holds Tauri's core IPC permissions; no plugin or filesystem permissions are granted. Any deviation from this declaration must update both this file and src-tauri/capabilities/default.json in the same change.

deferredPermissions.name: NSMicrophoneUsageDescription
deferredPermissions.reason: Declare only when native client microphone capture ships in the packaged client.

deferredEntitlements.name: com.apple.security.device.audio-input
deferredEntitlements.reason: Declare only when native client microphone capture ships in the packaged client.

deferredPermissions.name: android.permission.RECORD_AUDIO
deferredPermissions.reason: Declare only when native client microphone capture ships in the packaged client.

deferredPermissions.name: NSMicrophoneUsageDescription
deferredPermissions.reason: Declare only when native client microphone capture ships in the packaged client.
